chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Muslim Killing a Dhimmi, a Slave, a Mudabbar, or a Mukatab, or Them Killing a Muslim

text: 5258 - وَ قَدْ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ آذَى ذِمَّتِي فَقَدْ آذَانِي".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5258 - The Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever harms one under my protection (dhimmah) has indeed harmed me."
